publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-12-03 18:26:12 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Papers include Alpha Phi Alpha and National Association of Black Accountants material.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Darryl R. Matthews, Sr., graduated from the University of Central Missouri (1975-1977) with a degree in Sociology/Political Science. He was the Executive Director ∓ Chief Operating Officer of the National Association of Black Accountants (NABA) from March 1998 - March 2007, the 32nd General President of Alpha Phi Alpha Fraternity from January 2005 - December 2008, the Executive Director of the National Medical Association (NMA) from October 2011 - January 2014, and the Executive Director of the NABA from January 2014 - October 2015.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Papers include Alpha Phi Alpha and National Association of Black Accountants material.

emph.ref: Series II. National Association of Black Accountants

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Darryl Ricardo Matthews Sr. Papers, #8542. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 6, folder 60 restricted until 2067 or to the permission of the University Archivist.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Given at the Southern Region convention

scopecontent.p: Includes notes, membership lists, and debate materials.
